message:
feat: add wisp_type='gc_report' to mol-session-gc formula (gt-hp5p)

The three patrol formulas already had wisp_type set. This adds the
wisp_type var to mol-session-gc so compaction policy can distinguish
GC report wisps from patrol wisps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -244,6 +244,10 @@ Dog returns to available state in the pool.
 **Exit criteria:** Deacon notified, dog ready for next work."""
 
 [vars]
+[vars.wisp_type]
+description = "Type of wisp created for this molecule"
+default = "gc_report"
+
 [vars.mode]
 description = "GC mode: 'conservative' or 'aggressive'"
 default = "conservative"

@@ -244,6 +244,10 @@ Dog returns to available state in the pool.
 **Exit criteria:** Deacon notified, dog ready for next work."""
 
 [vars]

 description = "GC mode: 'conservative' or 'aggressive'"
